onboarding.slide1Sub: Haɗu da masu bi a faɗin duniya. Ku girma tare, a ketare kowane iyaka da kowace ƙasa.
onboarding.poweredBy: AMEN TECH ne ke ƙarfafa shi
onboarding.slide2Sub: Kowane zaman nazari, kowace addu'a da kowace abota suna ƙara 'ya'ya ga Bishiyar Rayuwarka — hoto ne na tafiyarka ta ruhaniya.
onboarding.slide3Sub: Haɗin kai mai hankali yana haɗa ka da abokin nazari mai raba harshenka, yankin lokacinka da lokacin ruhaniya da kake ciki.
onboarding.slide4Sub: Shiga ɗakunan addu'a kai tsaye, wallafa a bangon addu'ar ƙasa, kuma yi wa mutanen duniya da ba su kai ga Bishara ba roƙon ceto.

learn.title: Koyo
learn.coreCurriculumSubtitle: Babban Tsarin Koyarwa na P2P shi ne tafiyar almajiranci ta asali ta P2P Global Bible Study Network — an haɓaka shi cikin addu'a ƙarƙashin jagorancin Ruhu Mai Tsarki, kuma an kafa shi sosai bisa ikon Littafi Mai Tsarki. An ƙirƙire shi domin tabbatar da masu bi cikin Almasihu, ya kai su ga balagar ruhaniya, kuma ya tasar da masu yin almajirai waɗanda za su ɗauki tasirin Mulki zuwa kowane fanni na al'umma.
learn.coreCurriculumSubtitleQuote: An kafa shi bisa Maganar Allah. Ruhu Mai Tsarki ne ke jagoranta. An gina shi domin yin almajirai.
learn.plansSubtitle: Kowane Tsarin Nazarin P2P ya samo asali ne daga ikon Maganar Allah kuma an haɓaka shi cikin addu'a domin shirya masu bi zuwa almajirancin da ya mai da hankali ga Almasihu. Bisa koyarwar amintattun fastoci, malamai, masu bishara da shugabannin Kirista, kowane tsari yana mayar da gaskiyar Littafi Mai Tsarki zuwa tafiyar koyo ta musamman wadda ke ƙarfafa balagar ruhaniya, biyayya ta aikace da tasirin Mulki.
learn.plansSubtitleQuote: Muryoyin amintattu ne suka yi wahayi zuwa gare shi. An kafa shi bisa Maganar Allah. An ƙirƙire shi domin ya ninka almajirai.
learn.noPlans: Babu tsare-tsare a yanzu. Duba nan ba da daɗewa ba!
learn.unlockPlan: Kammala tsarin da ya gabata domin buɗe wannan
